meta.home: Free, open-source public data about Bosnia and Herzegovina. Browse postal codes and universities via REST API or interactive interface.
meta.postal: Search and browse all postal codes of Bosnia and Herzegovina. Look up any city or area by postal code or name.
meta.universities: Explore universities and academic programs in Bosnia and Herzegovina.
meta.api: REST API documentation for Bosnia Lens. Access postal codes and universities data programmatically.
meta.login: Log in to your Bosnia Lens account to contribute data and track your submissions.
meta.signup: Create a free Bosnia Lens account to start contributing postal code and university data.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.needLogin: You need to be logged in. Redirected to the login page.

home.title: Home Page
home.heading: Welcome to Bosnia Lens
home.description1: A free, open-source project providing structured public data about Bosnia and Herzegovina through a REST API and web interface.
home.description2: Currently focused on postal codes, with universities as the next planned dataset - making Bosnian public data open, searchable, and developer-friendly.
home.availableDataPostalCodes: Postal codes - browse all or search by code and city name
home.contributingReadmeSuffix: for details on our code of conduct and the process for submitting pull requests.
home.contributingReadme: Please read CONTRIBUTING.md for details on our code of conduct and the process for submitting pull requests.
home.contributingWelcome: We welcome contributions of data, code improvements, documentation, and bug reports.

postalCodes.title: Postal Codes
postalCodes.description: Browse all postal codes or search by code and city name.

restApi.title: REST API
restApi.description: Integrate Bosnia Lens data into your own app via our public REST API. View documentation and available endpoints.

search.label: Search by Postal Code or Municipality
search.error: An error occurred while searching for postal codes.

getAll.error: An error occurred while fetching postal codes and municipalities.

api.title: REST API
api.publicIntro: Public REST endpoints are available under the base URL below. These endpoints do not require authentication.
api.authIntro: Authenticated endpoints are separate from the public base URL and use session cookies plus CSRF tokens for write operations.
api.authFlowBody: These endpoints require an authenticated session (credentials: include) and use CSRF protection for mutating requests.

endpointsData.getAllPostalCodes: Retrieve all postal codes, ordered by code ascending.
endpointsData.searchPostalCodes: Search postal codes by numeric code (exact 5-digit match) or by city name (case-insensitive, minimum 2 characters).
endpointsData.searchTermParam: A 5-digit postal code (e.g. 71000) or a city name (e.g. Sarajevo, minimum 2 characters).
endpointsData.csrfIssue: Issue a CSRF token used in the x-csrf-token header for mutating requests.
endpointsData.authSignup: Register a pending account and send a confirmation email.
endpointsData.authConfirm: Confirm signup token and create the user account.
endpointsData.contributionCreate: Suggest a new postal code (stored as pending change).
endpointsData.contributionUpdate: Suggest an edit to a postal code (stored as pending change).
endpointsData.contributionDelete: Suggest deletion of a postal code (stored as pending change).
endpointsData.contributionPendingDelete: Remove one of your own pending suggestions.
endpointsData.adminApprove: Approve a pending suggestion and apply it to the live dataset.

contribution.needUser: You need to be a registered user to propose changes to the content.
contribution.selectDatasetError: You need to select a dataset.

admin.needAdmin: You need to be an admin to see the admin dashboard.
admin.needLoginAndAdmin: You need to be logged in and an admin to see the admin dashboard.
admin.noPendingChanges: There are no pending changes at the moment.

longWait.unreachable: Server can't be reached after multiple attempts. Please try again later.
longWait.wakingUp: Getting response from the server is taking longer than expected (server might be waking up). Please wait...

email.missingDomain: Please enter a part following '@'. {{email}} is incomplete.

password.minLength: Password must have at least 6 characters
password.mustMatch: Password and confirm password fields must match

postalCode.fiveDigits: Postal code must be a 5-digit number

search.minLength: Search must have at least 2 characters

postal.deleteError: An error occurred while deleting the postal code.
